name: Anchor Context
description: Cache-backed Anchor task/habit/project context injected into every OpenClaw prompt. Subscribes to Anchor change webhooks for zero-latency freshness.

anchorUrl.description: Base URL of your Anchor deployment (e.g. https://anchor.yourdomain.com)

apiKey.description: Your personal Anchor API key — generate it in Anchor → Settings → AI Assistant → OpenClaw

webhookSecret.description: Optional HMAC secret for verifying change event payloads

cacheTtlMs.description: Max cache age before forcing a re-fetch (default: 300000ms = 5 min)
